name: learn-on
description: Enable continuous learning mode for automatic insight extraction
capabilities: Enables continuous learning mode for automatic insight extraction
Reads and updates knowledge/state.json to track learning state
Sets extraction trigger thresholds of 10 queries or 30 minutes
Confirms activation status with clear output to user
Persists learning mode across session until disabled or session ends
author: 0xrdan
securitySummary: All 15 static findings are FALSE POSITIVES. This is a pure prompt-based skill with no executable code. It only reads/writes to its own local knowledge/state.json file within the skill directory. No network calls, no command execution, no external dependencies. The static scanner misidentified Markdown code formatting and JSON metadata as security patterns.
valueStatement: Manually triggering insight extraction during long sessions is easy to forget. This skill activates automatic learning mode where insights are captured every 10 queries or 30 minutes without manual intervention.
limitations: Only operates within the skill own knowledge directory
Does not extract insights itself only enables the automatic trigger
Resets on new sessions must be re-enabled each session
Does not modify or read the actual learning content files

useCases.title: Capture Patterns Automatically
useCases.description: Document code patterns and solutions as you work without breaking flow or remembering to run extraction commands.

useCases.title: Track Insights Over Time
useCases.description: Build a knowledge base of learnings automatically during extended sessions with clients or complex projects.

useCases.title: Document Discoveries Continuously
useCases.description: Automatically capture research insights and decisions as they emerge during long investigation sessions.

promptTemplates.title: Check Status
promptTemplates.prompt: What is the current learning mode status

bestPractices: Enable learning mode at the start of long working sessions to capture the most insights.
Combine with /learn for manual extraction when you reach a natural stopping point.
Use /knowledge to verify learning status before assuming automatic extraction is active.
antiPatterns: Enabling learning mode mid-session and expecting retroactive capture of earlier insights.
Assuming learning mode persists across separate sessions it resets on new sessions.
Disabling learning mode expecting automatic extraction to continue it stops immediately.

faq.question: Does learning mode persist across Claude restarts?
faq.answer: No. Learning mode resets when Claude restarts or begins a new session. Re-enable it each session.

faq.question: What triggers automatic insight extraction?
faq.answer: Automatic extraction triggers after 10 queries or 30 minutes of continuous activity, whichever comes first.

faq.question: Can I use manual extraction while learning mode is active?
faq.answer: Yes. You can run /learn at any time for manual extraction. This does not disable automatic mode.

faq.question: Is my data safe with this skill?
faq.answer: Yes. This skill only reads and writes to its own local state file within the skill directory. No external access.

faq.question: Why are my insights not appearing in the knowledge base?
faq.answer: This skill enables automatic triggers but does not perform extraction itself. Ensure /learn-on ran successfully and thresholds were reached.

faq.question: How does this compare to manual /learn command?
faq.answer: /learn performs immediate extraction. This skill enables automatic extraction at set intervals without manual intervention during sessions.
